reason: The approved MVP + 5 resolved design decisions (camelCase alias, evidence sidecar, two cc_result/re_result arms, RE stub source, FE-default chrome). Read first.

Concrete edit-site checklist: FE evidence field lists to mirror, _analyze_result injection point, the two typed-gate sites (runtime_emitted.py:355-382 + assertions.py:197), scenario_monitor_exp test-flip.
Why the data is stubbed: analyze path is statically deferred, CcEvidence maps to CCResult.uv_inspection, RE has no telemetry source. Justifies the stub seam.
Rule 10 cross-layer contract doc — D6 dual-path persistence, SerializedEvent DTO, the form-confirm contract. MUST update for the new result_review typed arm + evidence sidecar.

Authoritative event roster: TaskResultAnalyzedEvent (L89), FormRequestedEvent original_action variants (L84), confirm_kind enum. The result_review/CcParamsConfirmAction pattern to extend + the doc to update.
L4 form_payloads.py spec — OriginalAction discriminated union + apply() side-effects (result_review confirm advances plan cursor). Edit target for the cc_result/re_result arms.
analyze_cc_result/analyze_re_result tool contract (L47/L50), D16 non-blocking semantics, MindNoticeEvent(phase=post) fail-loud rule (I-ST-D L143). Governs the _analyze_result injection.
FE-BE wire contract: task_result_analyzed {trial_id, analysis} (L326), confirm_kind enum (L77). Rule 10 — must document the new typed evidence body + camelCase casing.
FE result-stage wiring: result-stage-model/fixtures/adapters (L45-48), the 'fixtures pending BE wire support' note (L46) this task closes. The cc+re fixture-removal + adapter convergence target.
FE SSE event shapes incl. FormRequestedEvent original_action + result_review (L45/L73). Update for the typed evidence payload FE now consumes off the wire.
FE type-safety conventions — governs how the new typed wire payload is consumed (no any, discriminated unions) when converging result cards off fixtures.
Cross-cutting guides (code-reuse, cross-layer thinking) — always-included shared context for a contract change spanning BE + FE layers.
